title: Equilabium spananthum
taxonomy: Equilabium spananthum belongs to the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the spindletree or bittersweet family. This classification places Equilabium spananthum within the order Celastrales, a group of plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The Celastraceae family is characterized by its diverse range of species, with many being woody vines or shrubs. Members of this family often produce showy flowers and have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Equilabium spananthum's classification is an essential part of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
